reviews.review_description: It doesn’t let me get in it keeps flickering I can’t get in without bugs

reviews.review_title: Dead app with next to no working feature
reviews.review_description: YouTube doesn't work which is supposedly a main feature, the app is full of bugs, not enough instructions, can't even get the beer pong to work which says everything you need to know about this app

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you had a bad experience! I did update the app though so youtube should be working again now. :)

reviews.review_title: Finally a fun beer pong game for Quest
reviews.review_description: I am very impressed with the graphical quality and realistic gameplay against a robot. Haven’t tried playing against humans. Enjoy listening to songs on the YouTube console while playing this game. Excellent simulation of beer pong. When the developer is able to make the robot’s skill more of a challenge I will rate this 5 stars.

I stumbled on this one while looking through sidequest and happy I did. It's awesome. 

While it's called beer pong, the dev basically made it an awesome hangout area for friends to meet up in VR. Very well made. I highly recommend picking this one up
Youtube works now and playing beer pong while watching youtube is perfect, app is made really well by a solo dev and and this game has a lot of great potential and worth trying out

Full Video Review over on my Channel

I had a great laugh when i jumped in with my mate. The basement is set out really well with plenty of TV screens where you can put on any youtube video, a Flappy bird clone arcade machine and a slot machine.

You can use Readyplayerme Avatars although something is wrong and you dont have any pants

We did find a few bugs which i have reported back to the Devs to Fix.

The beer pong gameplay works really well and with the added powerups, and collectables makes it a fun game.

reviews.review_title: Fun place to party or chill!
reviews.review_description: Hey, I'm the developer of this game. :) It's my passion project and I work on it whenever time allows it. I made this game to have a cool little hangout area to meet up with friends, have a drink, chat and play around in. If you want to help with this project, submit ideas or bugs or just want to find people to play with feel free to join the game's Discord: https://discord.gg/4KQcQFJQQM

There's not much you can do on here. the pong ball is nice and I like the fact that you can use YouTube to listen to music. The game has potential. There's in-game transactions you have to buy coins in order to play some of the games. The only free game you can play is pong ball that's it free. The bird game is free for now ,dart game is not working ,card game not working it gets pretty boring pretty fast.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you so much for playing my game and for giving feedback! I do agree that the game can use more activities and I'm working hard on adding more fun things to do in the basement. :)

Have you tried playing with the "Power-Ups" enabled to change things up a little? And maybe try and find / unlock all the secret balls in the game.

Also just to clarify, you don't actually buy coins with real money, but instead earn them by playing / hitting cups.

Feel free to join my Discord if you want to add suggestions/ideas or just to find somebody to play and hang out with: https://discord.gg/djRtZZ9Fnb

I'm happy that you like the core game and I'll be working hard to make this a more enjoyable experience! Now that I have added support for rooms with up to 4 people I can concentrate on expanding the in-game content. :)

reviews.review_title: Really fun chill experience with friends
reviews.review_description: The throw mechanics are awesome, both for tossing and bouncing. The power ups are actually fun and enhance the game! PLUS you can play YouTube and listen to some tunes while you Pong it up! There are even other activities and “hidden balls” you have to search for (no other way to put that, sorry!) The Ready Player Me avatar integration is a nice touch too!

reviews.review_title: Add A Virtual Hangout To Your Home
reviews.review_description:
Graphics: The graphics of the game are nice. Everything is to size and feels right. Nothing feels out of place or immersion breaking. It looks and feels like a real basement. There is even a snow night scene outside the windows to see. 4/5

Sounds: The music is what ever you can find on YouTube. From your favorite tunes to watching cartoons. The sound effects are great and help with the immersion. Example is hanging out in the TV lounge area, you can hear the fire crackling away, giving you that warm feeling. 4/5

Controls:  Controls are very simple to learn and adjust to your play style from a popup screen. From sitting to standing, movement style, its all there to make you comfortable in game. The game also support room scaling. I love walking over to the card table and sitting down to draw. There was some delay time to time in picking up the ball, but nothing breaking. The throwing of the ball is spot on and feels very real. 4/5

Fun Factor: This game is just packed with fun. Playing it solo or with another person, you are going to have a blast. Plus there are secret balls to find. It can be a party place, or your own personal place to just hangout and play. One thing I would like to see added to the game is some darts, to go with that dart board. 4/5

Immersion:  This is a immersive game. Its simple but very immersive at the same time. Everything feels to scale and graphically pleasant to the eyes. The sounds are just right, and movement is amazing. The physics in the world are great. Johnny has spilt my beer a few times, knocking it over with a ping pong ball. The Ready Player Me avatar compatibility allows for everyone to have a personal unique avatar making it even more immersive not seeing the same avatar time. One thing I would like is more little items around the basement I can pick up and interact with. 5/5

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/vTZRi4IrFbI
With smooth physics and a fun environment to hangout with friends in, Beer pong basement is easily the most enjoyable cup toss game on the market

I love this game entirely, everything about this game has not only my attention but some friends as well. However, and I can't speak for everyone that's played this, but I am experiencing some serious glitches. Such as, bounces not registering, and when they do the game takes the same cup, for example. Not sure sure if it's just me but my oculus is up to date but the game does have days where it's super glitchy.

Purchased with a friend last night. We both had the same issue - when playing as the second player, neither of us could pick up the ball to throw it making the game unplayable. When playing as the first player we had no problems. Other issue seems to be the search interface for YouTube - I couldn't seem to get more than 5-6 results and had no way of scrolling (that I could see).
Has the potential to be a fun app once the bugs are resolved.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you so much for the review! And sorry that the game (in multiplayer) was that problematic. I am working on an update right now that should fix a lot of things and since I've been playing with other people the last few days on the test channel I'm optimistic that it will fix the issue you were having. All the best, Jonas

//I just released the new update. Try it out if you find the time and see if your bugs are resolved! :)

reviews.review_description: I cant start any YouTube Video
I installed and reinstalled it twice, and it keeps bugging out. Everything flickers, and nothing works. I have to restart the headset just to exit the app.
I can’t get YouTube to work on 9/2/24.
The fact I can play music off of YouTube makes this so much fun. I love all the little side things you can do while someone takes their turn, the different skins for balls, it's all fun

reviews.review_title: I have a real affection for BPB
reviews.review_description: A visually interesting and realistic basement.

It’s perfect! 
I like the way you can select a video from YouTube and it will play on the TV’s. it’s such a cool feature! 
 
Great game to chill out in
This game is so cool. Lots of fun! Love that you can also play you tube videos, slots, flappy cuppy & have a beer or 2. But what is with the 🎯? How does that work?
